symptom: No GPS fix, or accuracy radius stuck large

steps.do: Move to open sky, away from canopy, cliffs, and vehicles.
steps.why: Canopy and walls cause multipath and block satellites.

steps.do: Wait 60-90 seconds without moving for a cold fix.
steps.why: The receiver needs time to download almanac/ephemeris.

steps.do: Toggle airplane mode off/on or restart location services.
Confirm location permission and high-accuracy mode are enabled.
steps.why: Battery-saver modes drop GNSS to network-only.

steps.do: Check the reported accuracy radius before recording.
steps.why: Record only when it has settled (e.g. <5 m).

steps.do: If still failing, geotag via barometer elevation + compass bearing from a known landmark.
steps.why: Camera-free fallback when GNSS is unavailable.

escalate_if: No fix after 5 minutes in open sky -> suspect hardware/antenna; log position by landmark + bearing and report to base.
